chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Civil Transfer Application No.14 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 608/19 2. For orders on M.A 609/19 3. For orders on M.A 610/19 4. For hearing of main case 15.03.2019 Mr. Hameedullah Dahri, Advocate for the applicants...... The only grievance of the applicants to move this transfer application is that they had moved an application u/o 6 Rule 17 CPC before the trial court but the same was not entertained. The impugned orderby District Judge Sanghar dismissing the transfer application shows that in Para-5 he while referring to the comments of the trial court has observed that the applicants / plaintiffs had closed their side on 04.08.2015 and continuously for three years they did not move any application for amendment and not even at the time of final arguments. He has further observed that in the comments the learned trial court has stated that the case is fixed for judgment but if such application is filed it would be dealt with in accordance with law. When confronted with such situation learned Counsel submits that he does not press this transfer application and would move the aforesaid application before the trial court in the light of its comments. Accordingly, this transfer application in the light of above stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Ali Haider
